title: Jepsonia malvifolia
taxonomy: Jepsonia malvifolia is classified in the family Staphylocactaceae. However, there is some debate among botanists regarding its correct classification. Its roots and stems are said to have anti-inflammatory properties and are used to treat various ailments. The plant's medicinal uses are not extensively documented, and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
